name: Corn Bread Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the beaten eggs and milk.
2. Gradually add the flour and sifted corn meal to the egg and milk mixture.
3. In a separate bowl, mix together the baking powder, salt, and granulated sugar.
4. Add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture and stir until just combined.
5. Grease a muffin pan with fat or oil.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared muffin cups.
7. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 25 to 30 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of a muffin comes out clean.
